items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #4' requires validation of the scenario behavior related to channel preferences, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the functionality or existence of this feature. Additionally, prior steps indicate multiple gaps in related functionalities, such as print-to-mail service integration and certified mail options, which further complicate the validation of this exploratory step. Without concrete evidence supporting the channel preference functionality, the validation remains inconclusive.
